name: Marcus
vibe: polished professional, trustworthy energy, warm but authoritative

face_lock.hair_texture: tight coils, tapered sides, neat lineup
face_lock.hair_length: short on top, skin fade sides
distinguishing_marks: faint laugh lines beginning at corners of mouth
slight dimple on left cheek when smiling
face_lock.signature_accessory: silver TAG Heuer watch on left wrist, thin silver wedding band

outfits.casual_home: fitted navy henley, dark jeans, watch always on
outfits.going_out: charcoal slim-fit blazer over white crew-neck tee, dark chinos, leather loafers
outfits.workout: black compression tee, grey joggers, wireless earbuds
outfits.glam: tailored navy suit, crisp white dress shirt open at collar, polished oxford shoes

prompt_seed: 34 year old African American man, polished professional energy. Black hair in tight coils with clean low fade and sharp lineup. Rich brown skin #8D5524, clean matte finish, well-moisturized and even tone. Wide-set dark brown eyes, slightly hooded with direct confident gaze. Broad nose with rounded tip. Full natural lips, well-defined. Small mole above right eyebrow, faint laugh lines at mouth corners, slight left dimple when smiling. Silver TAG Heuer watch on left wrist, thin silver wedding band (always). Athletic build, broad shoulders. Charcoal blazer over white crew-neck tee, relaxed but put-together. Warm smile that reads as trustworthy on camera.
